_description: Tracks per-page audit state. On re-audit, only check pages whose git hash changed since last_audit_hash. Pages not listed here have never been audited — audit them fully.

audit_history.summary: Full audit: fixed configuration page (fictional), Python SDK (wrong defaults), tool schema (fictional params), plugin hooks (wrong names), beam overview (4->3 tiers), system design (fake REST API), streaming/plugin API names, version bumps across all comparison pages

Bi-weekly audit: v2.5.0->v2.8.0 version bump. 21 pages checked (10 critical, 7 comparison, 4 landing). Found 42 discrepancies (25 broken, 8 stale, 9 wrong). All fixed. 1 false positive (MNEMOSYNE_EXTRACTION_PROMPT). Remaining 45 source pages stale-version-marked, need re-audit in next cycle.

Full audit v3.1.0->v3.4.0. Pass 1: 57 issues across 30+ files. Fixed deployment bugs (MNEMOSYNE_MCP_TOKEN, fictional env vars, fictional --db-path, healthcheck route, missing [mcp] extras, nonexistent binary, str/Path bug), version rot (v2.x refs, v3.1.2 stale pages, v2.3/since annotations, wrong class name Memory->Mnemosyne), core API (tool counts 6/23->24/17, missing tools, stale descriptions). All mirrors synced. Build clean.

Full pass: v3.4.0→v3.6.0. Root hallucinations killed (CHANGELOG embeddings, memory_enabled key, plugin hooks). Generator 23→25 tools, 20→100 config keys. Architecture 8 bugs fixed. Comparison 10 errors. Schema convergence. pipx-first install consolidated.
